description: A circular close-up photograph depicts a small, plover-like bird standing on sparse, reddish-brown ground vegetation, which appears to be heather or dwarf shrubs. Lighter patches of ground are visible between the vegetation. The bird faces right, exhibiting light underparts, a darker back, and a distinct light stripe above its eye. The image captures a natural, open landscape, characteristic of subalpine or alpine grassland and heathland environments.
